title: charar #2787
definition:
1) to burn, be hot, be scorched, be charred
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be hot, be scorched
        1a2) to burn, be burned
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be scorched, be burned
        1b2) to burn
        1b3) to be dry, be angry
    1c) (Pilpel) to cause to burn
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to burn, be hot, be scorched, be charred
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be hot, be scorched
        1a2) to burn, be burned
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be scorched, be burned
        1b2) to burn
        1b3) to be dry, be angry
    1c) (Pilpel) to cause to burn

    NASB:  to be hot or scorched, to burn
